title: This 26 y/o 10x'd Revenue Doing the Opposite of Every AI Startup | Paraform, John Kim
summary: John Kim's Paraform has paid out $50 million to human recruiters while competitors pursue automation, achieving 10x revenue growth by prioritizing recruiter efficiency over AI replacement. Kim argues that AI has made hiring noisier by increasing cold email volume from 500 to 5,000 per hire over five years, and that human judgment remains the sustainable moat in hiring.
